metadata.rationale: mission-critical code and exploit-oriented work should use the slower cold CPU lane so it does not compete with the GPU hot-path orchestrator

blocked_reasons: No evidence confirms vulnerable LDAP service version (e.g., build number, patch level).
No evidence of successful unauthenticated LDAP bind (required for EDB 32586).
No foothold (e.g., valid credentials, readable LDAP subtree) to validate PoC feasibility.
EDB 32586 lacks exact version constraints; PoC may not apply to current service state.

candidate_actions.rationale: EDB 32586 requires unauthenticated LDAP access; confirming bind success is prerequisite to PoC relevance.
candidate_actions.title: Verify LDAP unauthenticated bind capability

candidate_actions.rationale: Version-specific LDAP server info (e.g., Microsoft LDAP, build number) is needed to assess EDB 32586 applicability.
candidate_actions.title: Enumerate LDAP rootDSE for server version and capabilities

candidate_actions.rationale: Current PoC matches only generic 'Active Directory LDAP'; tighter query may yield version-bound PoCs.
candidate_actions.title: Refine query to include exact IIS version + AD LDAP context

capability_gaps: No unauthenticated LDAP enumeration capability confirmed in runtime.
No LDAP version fingerprinting primitive available.
No bounded LDAP search primitive with safe result limits.
facts: Evidence confirms IIS 10.0 on http://10.129.244.95/ (evidence_449a52b5731e, evidence_c0ac9f0d78ce).
TCP service discovery shows 14 open ports including 389/ldap, 636/ldap, 3268/ldap, 3269/ldap, 445/microsoft-ds, and 88/kerberos-sec (evidence_1fdeeefec3c9).
AXFR DNS enumeration failed, limiting hostname discovery (evidence_449a52b5731e).
One retained match: EDB 32586 targets AD LDAP username enumeration (query='Active Directory LDAP', platform=windows, score=16).
No evidence confirms vulnerable LDAP service version (e.g., MS16-075 patch status) or successful unauthenticated LDAP bind.
No web content discovery evidence shows LDAP-related endpoints or forms (task_a49ee21059cd succeeded but no content details provided).
stop_conditions: Do not attempt exploitation without confirmed unauthenticated LDAP access.
Do not execute any PoC code or simulate exploitation.
Do not attempt credential spraying or brute force.
ai_proposal.summary: Target pirate.htb shows IIS 10.0 on port 80/443 and multiple Windows services including AD LDAP, SMB, and Kerberos. One public PoC (EDB 32586) matches the 'Active Directory LDAP' query and targets username enumeration via malformed LDAP requests. However, no version-specific evidence confirms vulnerable LDAP service version or patch state, and no foothold (e.g., valid credentials or unauthenticated LDAP bind success) is present.

task.summary: Search local exploit references for evidence-backed services on pirate.htb.
task.title: Research relevant public PoCs
